next_item_label: Follow the highlighted route from Pac-Man. Which labeled bonus item is reached first?
Which labeled bonus item comes first along the highlighted route from Pac-Man?
Starting at Pac-Man and moving along the highlighted route, report the first bonus item label reached.
Among the labeled bonus items, which one is encountered first on the highlighted route?
Report the label of the first bonus item reached when following the highlighted route from Pac-Man.
pellet_count_before_ghost: Follow the highlighted route from Pac-Man. How many normal pellets are reached before the first ghost on that route?
Starting at Pac-Man, count the normal pellets on the highlighted route before the first ghost is reached.
How many normal pellets come before the first ghost when following the highlighted route from Pac-Man?
Report the number of normal pellets Pac-Man would reach on the highlighted route before reaching the first ghost.
Count only the normal pellets before the first ghost along the highlighted route from Pac-Man.
route_score_value: {score_rule_text} Following the highlighted route from Pac-Man, what is the total score from collectibles centered on that route?
{score_rule_text} Add only the normal pellets and printed-value bonus items whose centers lie on the highlighted route.
{score_rule_text} What total score is collected from route collectibles, ignoring all off-route items?
{score_rule_text} Count only collectibles centered on the highlighted route and report their total score.
{score_rule_text} Starting at Pac-Man, follow the highlighted route and add the scores of collectibles on that route.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_compact_maze: a Pac-Man style maze with a visible Pac-Man marker, ghosts, normal pellets, bonus items, and a highlighted route
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_wide_maze: a wider Pac-Man style maze with a visible Pac-Man marker, ghosts, normal pellets, bonus items, and a highlighted route
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_next_item_label: set "annotation" to one [x, y] point coordinate at the center of the first labeled bonus item reached along the highlighted route
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_next_item_label: set "answer" to the single option letter of the first labeled bonus item reached along the highlighted route
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_pellet_count_before_ghos: set "annotation" to {"counted_pellets":[[x, y], ...], "first_ghost":[[x, y]]}, using center points for pellets before the ghost and the first route ghost
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_pellet_count_before_ghost: set "answer" to the number of normal pellets reached before the first ghost on the highlighted route
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_route_score_value: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of each normal pellet or printed-value bonus item included in the highlighted-route score
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_route_score_value: set "answer" to the integer total score from collectibles centered on the highlighted route
code_prompt_defaults.score_rule_text: Normal pellets score 1; bonus items score their printed value. Count only collectibles whose centers lie on the highlighted route. Ignore ghosts and all collectibles away from the highlighted route.
